data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 89,000 USDT with a 1.48% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 26, 2025, 02:23 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 89,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 89,035.398438 USDT, with a narrowed 1.48% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Caroline Ellison's Expected Release Date Set for 2026
data.description: According to Foresight News, the U.S. Federal Bureau of Prisons website indicates that Caroline Ellison, the former girlfriend of SBF, is expected to be released on January 21, 2026. Ellison previously testified as a key witness in the 2023 criminal trial of SBF. Despite her significant cooperation being acknowledged by the judge, she was still sentenced to prison.

data.title: Trust Wallet users lose at least $6 million in security breach, ZachXBT finds
data.description:
Trust Wallet confirmed Thursday that it has identified a security incident affecting a specific version of its web browser extension.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/383735/trust-wallet-extension-incident?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Most crypto markets declined, with the NFT sector falling by over 7%, while only the AI ​​and SocialFi sectors remained relatively resilient.
data.description: On December 26th, according to SoSoValue data, most sectors in the crypto market declined. The NFT sector, which performed well yesterday, fell 7.38% in the last 24 hours. Within the NFT sector, Audiera (BEAT) continued its downward trend, falling 40.02% after a slight rebound, while Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) and Apecoin (APE) fell 2.32% and 2.59% respectively. In contrast, the AI ​​and SocialFi sectors remained relatively resilient, rising 0.40% and 0.69% respectively in the last 24 hours. Within the AI ​​sector, Bittensor (TAO) rose 1.05%, and 0G (0G) rose 35.23%; within the SocialFi sector, Cheelee (CHEEL) surged 102.80%. In other sectors, the DeFi sector fell 0.54%, with Maple Finance (SYRUP) showing relative strength, rising 9.24%; the PayFi sector fell 0.71%, with Bitcoin Cash (BCH) rising 4.95%; the CeFi sector fell 0.86%, with Canton Network (CC) falling 4.25%; the Layer 2 sector fell 0.93%, but Merlin Chain (MERL) rose 4.85%; the Layer 1 sector fell 1.46%, with Algorand (ALGO) rising 2.30% intraday; and the Meme sector fell 2.93%, but PIPPIN (PIPPIN) bucked the trend, rising 4.56%. Crypto sector indices reflecting historical performance show that ssiSocialFi rose 0.26%, while the ssiMeme and ssiDeFi indices fell 3.23% and 0.74%, respectively.

data.title: Bitget Wallet upgrades its FOMO Thursday event and partners with Vision to launch a $100,000 reward incentive program.
data.description: Bitget Wallet announced an upgrade to its periodic incentive program, FOMO Thursday, to version 2.0. The initial phase will feature a partnership with Vision to distribute $100,000 worth of VSN as rewards. The new mechanism introduces instant lotteries and a task-driven model, aiming to enhance the connection between user on-chain behavior and incentives. Compared to the previous 1.0 version, which focused primarily on staking and had delayed lotteries, FOMO Thursday 2.0 supports more types of on-chain interactions, such as trading, referrals, and content sharing. Users can trigger an instant lottery upon completing a task, with results returned in real time. The program features both basic and advanced prize pools. The advanced prize pool provides a guaranteed reward upon completing designated tasks, reducing the uncertainty of participation. Vision, the initial partner, is supported by Bitpanda. Its ecosystem supports staking, governance, and fee discounts, and includes Vision Chain, a Layer 2 network focused on RWA scenarios, as well as Bitpanda's DeFi wallet and Launchpad products. FOMO Thursdays 2.0 is now integrated into its Rewards Hub as a unified entry point for user engagement and rewards.

data.title: Beats briefly fell below $1.45, with a 24-hour drop of over 40%.
data.description: Market data shows that BEAT briefly fell below $1.45 and is currently trading at $1.437, a drop of over 40% on the day.

data.title: Bitcoin Appears to Be Advancing Through the Wyckoff Cycle
data.description:
Bitcoin’s recent price structure continues to align closely with the classic Wyckoff market cycle, according to the chart shared by CryptoELITES. The framework outlines a familiar sequence, accumulation, markup, distribution, and eventual markdown, and the visual suggests the market has already progressed through the first two phases.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-appears-to-be-advancing-through-the-wyckoff-cycle/

data.title: Peter Schiff Predicts Silver's Rise Over Bitcoin by 2025
data.description: According to Foresight News, economist and gold advocate Peter Schiff recently shared his views on Bitcoin and silver through a social media post. Schiff noted that at the beginning of the year, Bitcoin holders were optimistic about the cryptocurrency's potential for significant growth. However, he pointed out that Bitcoin has faced numerous challenges, while precious metals have seen substantial gains. Schiff suggested that one of the most prudent trades by 2025 could be selling Bitcoin in favor of purchasing silver, a move he described as unexpected.

data.title: Everything to know about China’s so-called AI university Tsinghua
data.description:
China’s Tsinghua University sits in northwest Beijing and stretches across roughly 1,200 acres. On a typical afternoon, science and engineering students crowd the grounds. Badminton games run near the east gate. Inside the Laboratory of Brain and Intelligence, teams work quietly with whiteboards full of formulas and freshly painted walls while studying how the human […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/everything-to-know-about-chinas-tsinghua/

data.title: Uniswap Proposal to Activate Fee Switch Approved
data.description: According to Odaily, Uniswap's proposal to activate the fee switch has been approved following the final governance vote. After a two-day lock-in period, the fee switch for Uniswap v2 and v3 will be activated on the Unichain mainnet, leading to the destruction of UNI tokens. The proposal includes the destruction of 100 million UNI tokens from the Uniswap Foundation's treasury and the implementation of a protocol fee discount auction system to enhance liquidity provider earnings.

data.title: Global stocks, oil crash over Trump attacks in Venezuela and Nigeria as silver makes new ATH of $75
data.description:
Silver just blasted to a record $75 per ounce, now up 158% in 2025, with traders piling in fast after months of vault inflows and growing fears of US trade restrictions. Gold is inching toward its record of $4,525 an ounce, fueled by safe-haven demand as global markets buckle and tensions ripple through energy and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/global-stocks-oil-crash-silver-new-ath/

data.title: Whale Winslow Strong withdrew $27.03 million in cbBTC and $5.6 million in ETH from Aave and deposited them into Coinbase.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 8 hours ago, Winslow Strong (0xa0f7...9b73) withdrew 307 cbBTC and 1900 ETH from Aave and subsequently deposited them into Coinbase. The cbBTC was worth $27.03 million and the ETH was worth $5.6 million.

data.title: Uniswap's "Proposal to Enable Fee Switches" has been approved; v2 and v3 fee switches will be activated on Unichain.
data.description: Uniswap's "Proposal to Activate Fee Switch" has passed its final governance vote. After a two-day lock-up period, the Uniswap v2 and v3 fee switches will be activated on the Unichain mainnet, triggering the burning of UNI tokens. The proposal will burn 100 million UNI tokens from the Uniswap Foundation treasury and implement a protocol fee discount auction system to increase returns for liquidity providers.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description:
1. Caixin: Issuance and use of U-cards in China carries special legal risks.
2. ZachXBT: Hundreds of Trust Wallet users have had at least $6 million stolen.
3. Infinex founder: Reduces Sonar token sale FDV to $99.99 million to adapt to the current market environment.
4. Wintermute founder: Will vote against the Aave "governance control" proposal.
5. Ethereum plans two hard forks in 2026; L1 gas limit may increase to 200 million.
6. WLFI: USD1 market capitalization has exceeded $3 billion.
7. Binance Alpha: KGEN second airdrop requires 240 points to claim, and 15 points will be consumed upon application.
8. Tianji Holdings: Plans to invest HK$10 million to advance Web3 sports intellectual property projects.
9. Analysis: BTC lacks historical price support in the $70,000 to $80,000 range.
10. A whale holding $148 million in assets injects $400 into Hyperliquid. 11. A whale holding $740 million in long positions added 210,000 SOL, currently with a total unrealized loss of $58.96 million. 12. Yi Lihua: USD1 will become the leading stablecoin, WLFI is a project with continuous heavy investment. 13. Strategy CEO: The fundamentals of the Bitcoin market remain strong. 14. Wintermute CEO: Crypto developers and KOLs under 30 who announce their retirement are all scammers. 15. Nano Labs founder: The bottom of the Bitcoin bear market often appears around Christmas. 16. AllianceDAO co-founder: Stablecoin payments are unlikely to replace card organizations such as Visa in the short term. 17. Michael Saylor: Supports free use of the Bitcoin network but opposes modifying the underlying protocol. 18. "1011 Insider Whale" added 207,000 SOL, currently with a total unrealized loss of $43.32 million. 19. Quantum computing in 2026 will not cause cryptocurrency collapse, but the risk of "collect first, then decrypt" should be guarded against.

data.title: A whale that held BTC for 11 years and had been dormant for 3 years withdrew 181 BTC from Binance, worth $15.8 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (3JFgQr) that had been dormant for 3 years withdrew 181 BTC from Binance today, worth $15.8 million. This whale address had held BTC for 11 years.

data.title: Vitalik says Grok arguably a 'net improvement' to X despite flaws
data.description:
Grok makes X more truth-friendly as it often challenges users’ assumptions instead of confirming them, says Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/vitalik-buterin-says-grok-keeps-musks-x-more-honest?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
